---
title: "Quantum Computing"
author: "Chao Ma"
date: "2026-05-05"
---

Notes on quantum information and quantum computing, starting from classical states, probability vectors, Dirac notation, tensor products, quantum states, measurement, and unitary operations.

---

::: {.content-grid}

::: {.content-card}
**[Qiskit Lesson 2: Multiple Systems](qiskit-lesson-2-multiple-systems.qmd)**
Compound classical and quantum systems, Cartesian products, tensor products, marginal and conditional states, CNOT, Bell states, partial measurement, and local unitary operations.
:::

::: {.content-card}
**[Qiskit Lesson 1: Classical and Quantum Information](qiskit-lesson-1-classical-and-quantum-information.qmd)**
Classical states and probability vectors, Dirac notation, deterministic and stochastic operations, quantum states as complex unit vectors, measurement, and basic qubit gates.
:::

:::
